title: Kesselian Dragoon
content:
{{Top|imp|reb|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
The '''Kesselian Dragoons''' were an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outland]] military group who were led by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Mouff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]]. They were present at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi outpost]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] during the attack of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].

==Behind the scenes==
They were in the [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|second draft]] and [[The Star Wars: From The Adventures of Luke Starkiller|third draft]] of the script for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']].

The [[Kessil system]] included [[Utapau (Kessil system)|Utapau]] in the [[The Star Wars rough draft|rough draft]] and [[Ogana Major|Ogana]] in the [[The Star Wars first draft|first draft]].
